name: newfold-labs/wp-module-ai
description: A module for providing artificial intelligence capabilities.

test-coverage: echo "open tests/_output/html/index.html" to view the report

scripts-descriptions.fix: Automatically fix coding standards issues where possible.
scripts-descriptions.i18n-pot: Scan source and generate the POT translation template using wp i18n make-pot.
scripts-descriptions.i18n-po: Update PO files from the POT file using wp i18n update-po.
scripts-descriptions.i18n-php: Generate PHP translation files from PO files using wp i18n make-php.
scripts-descriptions.i18n-json: Remove stale JSON catalogs, then generate JED JSON from PO files using wp i18n make-json.
scripts-descriptions.i18n: Run the full local i18n pipeline (POT, PO, PHP, JSON).
scripts-descriptions.i18n-ci-pre: CI: regenerate the POT file and sync PO catalogs from it.
scripts-descriptions.i18n-ci-post: CI: regenerate JED JSON and PHP translation files from PO catalogs.
scripts-descriptions.test-coverage: Run tests with coverage, merge coverage and create HTML report.
